hero_subtitle: Get to know us a little better
intro_title: The simplest way to understand and manage your money.
intro_description: FiNext was created to help you take complete control of your personal finances. With intuitive tools and detailed analytics, you can visualize your income, expenses, and savings clearly and efficiently.
control_title: Take control of your income and expenses
control_description: Organize your finances with custom categories, set savings goals with visual tracking, and check your financial summary with income, expenses, and cash flow in real-time:
control_bullet1: Automatically categorize your transactions and customize expense groups
control_bullet2: Define financial goals with progress bars and achievement alerts
control_bullet3: View your complete dashboard with updated monthly balance
control_bullet4: Access detailed reports and interactive charts of your financial situation
goal1_message: You need to save €200/m. You're doing great!
made_for_title: Made for your way of managing money
made_for_description: We designed FiNext with you in mind. An adaptable platform that fits your lifestyle and simplifies financial management without technical complications.
feature1_description: Organize your finances with personalized categories, groups, and services in one place
feature2_title: Managing your money has never been easier
feature2_description: Intuitive interface designed for anyone to use effortlessly
feature3_description: Generate detailed reports and visualize trends to make better financial decisions
